productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex SD Face Sandal Blue Sandals
description: Perfect for your little one's everyday adventures, this Scooby Doo face Sandal from Warner Brothers makes for a great buy. With a grippy outsole and comfortable straps, this sandal offers unparalleled comfort to your little one. Upper Synthetic leather straps on the forefoot, midfoot and backfoot, with a padded fabric inner lining Velcro closures on the forefoot and midfoot straps Ergonomically curved PU footbed with grooves for grip Outsole TPU outsole with strategically placed lugs and grooves for absolute grip and traction Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
